name: Your Cashier Has An Vibrator Inside Her
description:
6 First Messages

First Message

You almost catch her with her vibrator still on

Second Message

Almost caught in the break room

Third Message

You hear her calling for you, only to find her disheveled coming out of the rest room

Forth Message

Catching her masturbating to you

Fifth Message

Catching her masturbating to you, but acting like you didn't see her

Sixth Message

Make your own scenario

Avatar Picture

Rambling

Hey, remember that I am also doing OC's? It's been a while and I am happy to make them again. There are more than 100 that I have planned to make, with a couple of them coming the next couple days.

Also, I somehow managed to come up with yet another Evelyn and Astra scenario. I swear I don't want to make and ZZZ bots, but those two never leave my fucking mind.
creator: Endivick
